name: Spun-Web-Claw-UI
description: Unified OpenClaw Skill Interface for Brave Search, VAPI Calls, and Twitter Automation
author: Spun Web
install: npm install && cd web && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npm run build

commands.name: brave-search
commands.description: Search the web using Brave Search

commands.name: brave-navigate
commands.description: Navigate to a URL using Puppeteer

commands.name: twitter-post
commands.description: Post a tweet via Twitter API
